resources.string: ⚠️ Please fill in the fields correctly
Great to see you. Explore the new pets looking for a home today.
Already have an account? Log in
Password must be at least 6 characters

The adoption request for the pet %1$s, type %2$s, registered under the name of %3$s, has been reviewed by the administrative team on %4$s.

Account status: %5$s.

%6$s
Because the 3 allowed failed attempts have been reached, your account has been disabled for new requests for the time shown on the top timer.
Your request does not meet all requirements at this time. You may try again with this or another pet when you are ready, provided you do not exceed the attempt limit (%1$d of 3 used).

Through this document, PetAdopta certifies that, after carrying out the evaluation process, information verification and corresponding approval, the adoption of the pet described below has been successfully formalized, complying with the guidelines, policies and requirements established by our organization to guarantee the welfare, protection and responsible care of the animal delivered for adoption.

The pet identified with the name %1$s, of type %2$s, breed %3$s, approximate age %4$s, and registered under the code or identifier %5$s, has been delivered for adoption to the citizen %6$s%7$s%8$s, who has voluntarily, consciously and responsibly expressed their commitment to provide a dignified, safe and adequate home.

By signing and accepting this process, the adopter declares having received the pet in fit conditions, as well as having been informed about its basic needs, general care, nutrition, veterinary controls, vaccination schedule (if applicable), deworming (if applicable), recommendations for adaptation to the new home and other relevant observations to ensure its correct physical and emotional well-being.

This certificate places on record that the adoption was carried out on %9$s, being officially registered in the platform and in the administrative files of PetAdopta, as evidence of the process of responsible delivery of the pet described above.
Your certificate will be available here once the administrator completes the final validation.
Enter your email and we will show you a security code.
Your code to reset the password is:
Enter your new password for the account %1$s
Your password has been updated correctly.
Passwords do not match or are empty
Identity verified successfully. Now you can change your password.
Enter the code we showed you previously for the account %1$s

GLOBAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS

1. Intermediation: PetAdopta connects rescuers with adopters.
2. Prohibited sale: The commercialization of living beings is not allowed.
3. Legal Capacity: Only over 18 years old.

PRIVACY POLICY

Your location and contact data are used only to facilitate adoption.
This action cannot be undone. %1$s will be deleted from the system.
Tap the card to flip it 🔄
THIS DOCUMENT ACCREDITS ITS HOLDER AS THE OWNER OF THE PET
The vaccine %1$s has been registered. Next dose: %2$s.
You have an appointment on %1$s at %2$s in %3$s.
Why do you want to adopt now?
What personality are you looking for?
Hours it will spend alone per day: %1$dh
Do you have a fenced yard?
Are you aware of food and veterinary expenses?
Who will care for the pet if you travel or get sick?
Spay/Neuter/Vaccination agreement: Do you accept the rules?
What would happen to the pet if you move?
I accept the terms of responsible adoption.
Our mission is to educate pet owners about the importance of a balanced nutrition to prolong the life and happiness of their companions.
We are preparing everything for you.
Your story with %1$s has been sent and is under review.
Your story about %1$s is now public.
Your story about %1$s does not meet current guidelines.
Your comment has been edited by a moderator.
Your request to adopt a pet has been sent successfully.
Congratulations, your adoption request has been approved.
Sorry, your adoption request has not been approved at this time.
The status of your request has changed.
Congratulations, your request has been signed and approved.
You have cancelled your adoption request for %1$s.
You have registered %1$s successfully. An administrator will review the post soon.
The changes to %1$s\'s information have been saved.
Your request to register the %1$s \'%2$s\' has been sent.
Your %1$s \'%2$s\' is now visible to the entire community.
Sorry, the registration of your %1$s \'%2$s\' has not been approved.
The content appears inappropriate. Suggestion: Please use more respectful and positive language.
AI Summary: Post about a %1$s. Key points: %2$s… Estimated relevance: %3$s. Recommended action: %4$s.
A user is interested in %1$s. Keep it up!
No pets found with those criteria.
You have redeemed your points for: %1$s. Enjoy!
Balanced nutrition formulated for your pet\'s well-being.
Do you want to open the external link to read more about this topic?
What you should never give them
Estimate how much your pet should eat daily.
Shelters and Vets at animal service
What type of partner are you?
Tap the button above to calculate statistics
Find the love of your life!
Unlock badges by performing actions in the App and earn extra points.
Logged in for the first time.
Adoption registry canceled by the administrator.
You have been on the App for a month.
You have 3 or more successful adoptions.
What do I need to\nadopt a pet?

DETAILS OF YOUR DATA:
1. Identity document (ID card/DNI).
2. Proof of current address.
3. Personal references (2 people).
4. Minimum age 21 years.

CALCULATE ANIMAL FOOD:
It is fundamental to know the exact amount of food your pet needs to stay healthy and energetic.

Use our recommended calculator to obtain a custom nutritional plan or purchase the best food for your new friend.

HOME REQUIREMENTS:
1. Safe and fenced space.
2. Covered area for rest.
3. Acceptance by all inhabitants.
4. Daily time for exercise and play.
It was the best day of my life when I found them.
Luna brought joy to our home.
Hi! I am a rescued %1$s looking for a home full of love. I am very playful and friendly. Come meet me!
I am looking for a home full of love. I am a very affectionate and playful %1$s. Give me a chance to be your best friend!
THIS PET ALREADY HAS A HOME ❤️
You don\'t have adopted pets yet
They are now part of your life!

The adoption of the pet %1$s, of type %2$s, has been successfully registered in the name of %3$s. The information has been correctly stored in the system and the pet\'s status has been updated as adopted. Thank you for completing the adoption process at PetAdopt.
Quindío Animal Defense Association. Over 20 years of rescue work.
Specialized 24/7 care in the heart of Armenia.
Halfway home for rescued dogs and cats in southern Quindío.
General consultation, surgery, and professional grooming.
Sanctuary dedicated to the care of abandoned senior pets.
Teaching hospital of the University of Quindío with comprehensive services.
Medical care for pets in the municipality of Calarcá.
Animal protection and environmental education in Salento.
Internal medicine and specialized clinical laboratory.
Country shelter with large green areas for recreation.
Mass rescue and sterilization throughout the Bogotá savanna.
Pioneers in high-complexity veterinary medicine in Colombia.
Specialized in the rescue and rehabilitation of abandoned cats.
The city\'s largest veterinary center with a 24h pharmacy.
Promoting the adoption of mixed-breed dogs (\'unique breeds\').
Tireless defenders of animal life in Antioquia.
Experts in animal behavior and feline medicine.
Official animal welfare center of the Medellín Mayor\'s Office.
Comprehensive medical services for pets and farm animals.
Rescue and education on urban and domestic wildlife.
Protective association dedicated to rescuing animals from abuse.
Cutting-edge medicine for pets in Valle del Cauca.
Country sanctuary with physical rehabilitation programs.
Clinic, grooming, and five-star canine hotel.
Fast and reliable medical care in the capital of Risaralda.
Rescue in the streets of the "City of Parks" and Santander.
Leaders in animal health on the Colombian Caribbean coast.
A paradise among the mountains for rescued animals.
Comprehensive care for the pets of the Walled City.
Protection and responsible adoption in central Colombia.
Specialized services in the Colombian plains.
You have redeemed your points for: %1$s. Enjoy!
